emails.subject: FW: Enron conf agrm
emails.body: Attached is the latest draft C/A from Intergen for their Deweyville plant. Please take a look and advise. Forwarded by Ned Higgins/HOU/ECT on 06/22/2000 10:28 AM "Rogers, David" <DRogers@INTERGEN.com> on 06/22/2000 09:18:23 AM
